report.claimBoundary: This is a bounded engineering pilot for startup, sign, phase, moving-boundary force accounting, and sampled population positivity. Its viscosity is 68.1 times the measured source condition, so its force errors are descriptive only and cannot establish experimental agreement or quantitative bird flight.
report.scientificVerdict: The viscosity-floor coarse pilot completed the phase-locked measured-motion Metal path with finite positive sampled populations and all four surface components present.

claimBoundary: This gate selects collision physics for one D=16 engineering completion allocation only. It does not use measured-force error, establish spatial convergence, or claim experimental agreement.

preregistration.claimBoundary: This preregistration freezes allocation and selection before any D=12 or D=16 measured-dove result is observed. The 68.07x viscosity-floor force error cannot select an operator or establish experimental agreement.
preregistration.fixedInputs: 0.08 m reference length; 0.0075 m surface half-thickness; 0.12 m padding; 0.06 m sponge width; 2000 Hz force registration; 16/24/32 fluid steps per force sample; fixed physical viscosity floor, density, geometry, kinematics, far-field treatment, moving-boundary operator, force estimator, and numerical gates
preregistration.selectionRule: Run both candidates at D=8 and D=12. Require completion, positive finite populations and loads, all four surface components, and correction activation at or below 5%. Select exactly one candidate only if it passes the locked stationary-wall cross-canonical correction gate and its normalized D8-to-D12 trend score is no more than 10% worse than the best eligible candidate. Otherwise authorize no D=16 run.

scientificVerdict: The preregistered D=8/D=12 discriminator selected positivity-preserving-recursive-regularized-bgk and authorizes exactly one D=16 completion run.
